---
title: Cerebellar Structural Network Differentiates Schizophrenia from Bipolar Disorder and Controls
presenter: Mahmoud Rashidi
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: Mahmoud Rashidi, Jayden Morales, Vince D. Calhoun, Bryon A. Mueller, Caroline Demro, Scott R. Sponheim, Jessica A. Turner
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}


![](mahmoudpresent.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
